name: Rocky Road Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a 9x13 baking pan.
3. Melt bittersweet chocolate and butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
4. Remove from heat and add sugar, blending well.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time.
6. Stir in flour and vanilla.
7. Add marshmallows, chocolate chips, and nuts and mix thoroughly.
8. Turn mixture into prepared pan, spreading evenly.
9. Bake until almost set, about 40-45 minutes.
10. Cool for 10 minutes.
11. Cut into squares.
12. Store brownies in an airtight container.
